languages.text: "О нет. Его тело состоит больше из металла, чем из плоти, но разум все еще весьма... человеческий. Это позволит ему преодолеть негативные физиологические реакции. Когда он освоится в новой реальности, ты получишь Себериана фон Валанциуса со всеми его знаниями, причудами... и неумеренными амбициями. Посмотрим, станут ли они его фатальным изъяном и в этот раз".

"Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

Когда он освоится в новой реальности, ты получишь Себериана фон Валанциуса со всеми его знаниями, причудами... и неумеренными амбициями. Посмотрим, станут ли они его фатальным изъяном и в этот раз".

Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

"Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, and that will enable him to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will most likely be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

"Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

"Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

languages.text: «Oh, no. Su cuerpo es más metal que carne, aunque su mente sigue siendo muy... humana. Podrá sobreponerse a las reacciones fisiológicas negativas. Cuando se haya aclimatado a esta nueva realidad, Seberian von Valancius estará en posesión de todos sus conocimientos, sus particularidades... y su ambición extrema. Veremos si esta vez acaba causando su caída».
languages.original_text: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, no. Su cuerpo es más metal que carne, aunque su mente sigue siendo muy... humana. Podrá sobreponerse a las reacciones fisiológicas negativas. Cuando se haya aclimatado a esta nueva realidad, Seberian von Valancius estará en posesión de todos sus conocimientos, sus particularidades... y su ambición extrema. Veremos si esta vez acaba causando su caída».

languages.text: “噢，不会。他的躯体金属多过血肉，尽管他的心智仍旧保留着……极具人性的部分。他可以克服不良的生理反应。等他适应了新的现实，你将要面对的便是一个完全恢复了昔日学识、怪癖……以及那膨胀野心的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。让我们拭目以待，看看这回它会不会再次成为他的致命弱点。”
languages.original_text: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

traits.locale_text: “噢，不会。他的躯体金属多过血肉，尽管他的心智仍旧保留着……极具人性的部分。他可以克服不良的生理反应。等他适应了新的现实，你将要面对的便是一个完全恢复了昔日学识、怪癖……以及那膨胀野心的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。让我们拭目以待，看看这回它会不会再次成为他的致命弱点。”

languages.text: « Oh non. Son corps est composé de plus de métal que de chair, mais son esprit reste très... humain. Il devrait pouvoir surmonter ses réactions physiologiques négatives. Une fois qu'il se sera acclimaté à cette nouvelle réalité, Seberian von Valancius devrait retrouver l'intégralité de ses connaissances, de ses excentricités... et de son ambition démesurée. Voyons s'il le paiera de nouveau de sa vie. »
languages.original_text: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

traits.locale_text: « Oh non. Son corps est composé de plus de métal que de chair, mais son esprit reste très... humain. Il devrait pouvoir surmonter ses réactions physiologiques négatives. Une fois qu'il se sera acclimaté à cette nouvelle réalité, Seberian von Valancius devrait retrouver l'intégralité de ses connaissances, de ses excentricités... et de son ambition démesurée. Voyons s'il le paiera de nouveau de sa vie. »

languages.text: "Hayır. Vücudunda etten çok metal var, gerçi zihni daha... İnsan. Bu, olumsuz fizyolojik tepkilerinin üstesinden gelmesini sağlayacaktır. Yeni gerçekliğe uyum sağladığında büyük ihtimalle tüm irfanına, tuhaflıklarına ve aşırı hırsına tamamen sahip bir Seberian von Valancius ile muhatap olacaksın. Bakalım bu sefer de onun ölümcül kusuru bu mu olacak..."
languages.original_text: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır. Vücudunda etten çok metal var, gerçi zihni daha... İnsan. Bu, olumsuz fizyolojik tepkilerinin üstesinden gelmesini sağlayacaktır. Yeni gerçekliğe uyum sağladığında büyük ihtimalle tüm irfanına, tuhaflıklarına ve aşırı hırsına tamamen sahip bir Seberian von Valancius ile muhatap olacaksın. Bakalım bu sefer de onun ölümcül kusuru bu mu olacak..."

languages.text: 「ああ、そうか。彼の体は肉体よりも金属でできているが、心は依然として非常に…人間的だ。彼は負の生理的反応を克服できるだろう。この新しい現実になれれば、あなたは知識、癖、そして大それた野望をすべて備えたシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスと対峙することになる。それが彼の致命的な欠点となるかどうかは、今度の勝負でわかるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、そうか。彼の体は肉体よりも金属でできているが、心は依然として非常に…人間的だ。彼は負の生理的反応を克服できるだろう。この新しい現実になれれば、あなたは知識、癖、そして大それた野望をすべて備えたシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウスと対峙することになる。それが彼の致命的な欠点となるかどうかは、今度の勝負でわかるだろう。」

languages.text: "Oh, nein. Sein Körper ist mehr Metall, denn Fleisch, aber sein Verstand ist immer noch recht ... menschlich. Er wird seine negativen physiologischen Reaktionen gewiss überwinden. Sobald er sich an diese neue Realität gewöhnt hat, habt Ihr es mit einem Seberian von Valancius im Vollbesitz seines Wissens, seiner Eigenarten ... und seines übersteigerten Ehrgeizes zu tun. Mal sehen, ob das seine tödliche Schwäche sein wird."
languages.original_text: "Oh no. His body is more metal than flesh, although his mind is still very... human. He will be able to overcome his negative physiological reactions. Once he has acclimatised to this new reality, you will be dealing with a Seberian von Valancius who is in full possession of all his knowledge, quirks... and outsize ambition. Let's see if that proves to be his fatal flaw this time around."
